headline: T. Rowe Price Stock Gains as Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, AUM Rises Y/Y
summary: TROW stock rises after Q1 earnings beat estimates as higher advisory fees and AUM growth offset rising expenses.

raw.headline: T. Rowe Price Stock Gains as Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, AUM Rises Y/Y
raw.summary: TROW stock rises after Q1 earnings beat estimates as higher advisory fees and AUM growth offset rising expenses.

headline: KKR & Co. Set to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: KKR's Q1 2026 results, scheduled to report on May 5, are expected to show year-over-year earnings and revenue growth, though higher costs may weigh on earnings.

raw.headline: KKR & Co. Set to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
raw.summary: KKR's Q1 2026 results, scheduled to report on May 5, are expected to show year-over-year earnings and revenue growth, though higher costs may weigh on earnings.
